THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EMDAY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT QUAN, TOHA WONG, ANNAYOU NOR $200,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $200,000.00, (DEFENDANTS SHALL PAY TO PLAINTIFF $7,000.00 PER MONTH COMMENCING OCTOBER 1, 2002 AND CONTINUING UNTIL PLAINTIFF HAS RECEIVED $200,000.00. PAYMENTS SHALL BE DUE ON THE 1ST CALENDAR DAY OF EACH MONTH AND SHALL BE DEEMED PAST DUE IF NOT RECEIVED BY PLAINTIFF ON OR BEFORE THE 10TH CALENDAR DAY OF EACH MONTH. SEE SCANNED DOC
